headline: Did Stronger Underwriting And A Higher Dividend Just Shift American International Group's (AIG) Investment Narrative?
summary: In the past week, American International Group, Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$6,650 million, net income of US$763 million and basic earnings per share from continuing operations of US$1.42, alongside an increased quarterly dividend of US$0.50 per share payable on June 29, 2026. Beneath the headline beat on earnings and revenue, General Insurance underwriting income more than tripled and the combined ratio improved sharply, highlighting how underwriting...

headline: A Look At American International Group (AIG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Recent performance context for American International Group stock American International Group (AIG) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up around 5% over the past week and about 4% over the past month, despite a negative year to date return. See our latest analysis for American International Group.
